name: cx-plugin
description: Stop babysitting your terminal. Get notified when Codex or Claude Code needs you.

interface.longDescription: Sends privacy-minimized reminders when Codex or Claude Code needs approval or finishes a response. Route events to Feishu, WeCom, DingTalk, desktop, generic HTTPS, or HMAC-signed webhooks without uploading code, terminal output, or assistant responses.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up desktop notifications for Codex.
Help me configure Feishu notifications for Codex and Claude Code.
Diagnose why CX Notifier did not send a notification.
